description: Metadata schema for all documents indexed in Vertex AI Search datastores

source_type.description: Content origin — determines citation format and datastore routing

language.description: Document language; used for query-time boosting, not hard filtering

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of original content creation (episode publish date, receipt date, etc.)

source_name.description: Human-readable source label (e.g. 'Motley Fool Money', 'Morningstar Investing Insights')

source_id.description: Unique identifier for the source document (RSS GUID or URL hash)

title.description: Episode title, article headline, or document name

chunk_start_sec.description: Start time in seconds for media chunks; absent on non-media documents

chunk_end_sec.description: End time in seconds for media chunks; absent on non-media documents

original_uri.description: Canonical URI of the source file (s3://, gs://, or https://)
